description: Investigate the 4 test failures in test_utils.py triggered by the markupsafe dependency bump
Trace the AttributeError to click.utils usage of markupsafe.soft_str and check the markupsafe changelog
Triage: CI-only impact, not affecting released versions. Priority medium - blocks merging PRs but no user-facing breakage yet
Post root cause analysis: markupsafe 2.1.5 removed soft_str; click.utils.echo needs updating to use markupsafe.escape or inline string coercion
Fix click.utils to replace markupsafe.soft_str with compatible alternative; pin markupsafe>=2.1.5 in requirements and update the echo function
